title: October 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 10''' is the 283rd day of the year (284th in leap years). There are 82 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[David Lodge]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Tony Pitts]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Quinton Flynn]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Bai Ling]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Michael Giacchino]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 85|''Star Wars Weekly'' 85]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' published in US.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 9]]'' published.
*2001 – [[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Bloodhawk Down]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Dark Times 5|''Dark Times'' 5]] published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Shadow of Malevolence|Shadow of ''Malevolence'']]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation 1|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' 1]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' 2]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Crimson Climb]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 7 – Unbound Force]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Cookbook]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[The High Republic: Jedi Brave in Every Way]]'' published.
